title: Beautiful Enchanted Books
description: This resource pack aims to improve the appearance of enchanted books, now each one will be different!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Enchanted_Books/BH_BEB_header.webp) **This resource pack aims to improve the appearance of enchanted books, now each one will be different!** This is something that the Minecraft community has asked the creators on countless occasions, since this way they will be able to differentiate themselves from each other. For this reason, we have created this fantastic resource pack that has unique textures related to the theme of each book. We have also added support for over 84 mods, including:
Spoiler Ad Astra: Giselle Addon, Additional Additions, Additional Enchanted Miner, Alex's Caves, Alex's Caves: Stuff & Torpedoes, Alex's Mobs, Alexs Caves Exemplified, Allurement, Apotheosis, Apothic Enchanting, Apothic Spawners, Ars Additions, Ars Elemental, Ars Nouveau, Arthropofia, AzureLib, Backpacked, Better Archeology, Better End, BetterNether, Biome Makeover, Box of Horros, Celestisynth, Clutter, CoFH Core, Combat Roll, Corail Tombstone, Create, Create Stuff & Additions, Darker Depths, Death Knights, Deep Aether, Deeper and Darker, Draconic Evolution, EnderIO, Ensorcellation, Eternal Starlight, EvilCraft, Farmer's Delight, Fins and Tails, Forbidden Arcanus, Galosphere, gofish, Golden Foods, Hunter's Return, Jaden's Nether Expansion, Just a lot more enchantments, Just Enough Guns, Kobolds, Malum, Midnight, MineColonies, My Nether Delight, Mystical Agriculture, Mythic Charms, MythicBotania, Nature's Aura, Nether Depths Upgrade, Opposint Forge, Piglin Proliferation, Railcraft Reborn, Reliquary Reincarnations, Species, Spawner+, Spell Engine, Spell Power Attribute, Stalwart Dungeons, Stellarity, Supplementaries, Terramity, The Bumblezone, The Deep Void, The End of Herobrine, The Twilight Forest, The Undergarden, The Undead Revamp, Things, Too Many Bows, Trials Chambers, Unusual Fish, UtilitiX, Vampirism, Vein Mining, When Dungeons Arise and You're in Grave Danger and Yomai Style.
Requires **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** or **[Forge CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit)** (also works with OptiFine). The designer of these textures is Arkadya. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Enchanted_Books/BH_BEB_summary.webp) The goal of Beautiful Enchanted Books is simple, and it's none other than to give a fresh look to all Minecraft books - no longer will they all have the same boring look! In addition, they will all have the same tone depending on the theme or the use they can be given, plus of course, unique features that will make them stand out from the rest. We are sure you are going to love these features! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Enchanted_Books/BH_BEB_FAQ.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VDTtLGSV/images/d34c7c7910e2acf5a583daedcf9bb9439ef813aa.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
